name: Sweet Potato Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 large Sweet potatoes, cooked and mashed
recipeInstructions:
1. Use about 1 1/2 pounds sweet potatoes.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. In a large bowl, beat together the margarine, sugar, and salt until well combined.
4. Add the egg yolk, lemon juice, lemon peel, and cinnamon to the mixture. Stir until smooth.
5. Gradually stir in the mashed sweet potatoes and milk until fully incorporated.
6. Gently fold in the beaten egg whites until just mixed.
7. Pour the filling into a 9-inch unbaked pie shell.
8. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. To reduce saturated fat, consider using a homemade pie shell made with vegetable oil.
Nutritional Information:
- 1/8 wedge: 263 calories, 2 starch exchanges, 2 fat, 6 grams protein, 13 grams fat, 32 grams carbohydrate, 3 grams fiber, 296 mg sodium, 524 mg potassium, 34 mg cholesterol
Adapted from The American Diabetes Association Family Cookbook, Vol. III. Recipe shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, January 1994.
